content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Plugin Genie: Generalist; FT or PT; MS Power Automate Anywhere in the World Utah Customer Support Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4994/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> USA <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://plugingenie.com">http://plugingenie.com</a> </p> <p>I'm hiring a generalist to help run and grow our business. Our company embraces 100% remote work and flexible hours. This can be a full-time or a part-time position.</p> <p>You will get to do a lot of different things in this role:</p> <ol> <li>Customer success &amp; service: Onboarding, debugging</li> <li>Marketing content: SEO, videos</li> <li>Paid ads: AI, search</li> <li>Sales: Outreach to partners</li> <li>Review management</li> <li>One-off projects</li> </ol> <p>I'd like to hire you if you:</p> <ol> <li>Have 1+ years' experience with Microsoft Power Automate.</li> <li>Are self-motivated and can solve problems independently.</li> <li>Like to work on a variety of tasks.</li> <li>Have excellent written and verbal English skills.</li> <li>Live in North or South America.</li> </ol> <p>My company is called Plugin Genie. I've only recently taken over management. We sell a connector between Monday.com and Microsoft Power Automate. This connector helps businesses who use Monday.com create automations to connect with the 1,000+ tools that Power Automate can talk to. This helps companies automate tedious workflows and integrate their various systems together, while still relying on Monday.com for their collaboration and work management.</p> <p>You will be responsible for running the day-to-day operations. You'll get to interact with customers to make sure they understand it, as well as helping them with any issues that come up. You'll get to work on marketing efforts, creating articles, videos and ads. You'll have a lot of autonomy to figure out how to best approach a problem. This will be an enjoyable role for the right person.</p> <p>So, if you want to have a meaningful impact on a helpful product, and join a small, distributed team, then we should talk.</p> <p>To apply, fill out the application here: <a href="https://forms.gle/7WHLEmLCBhTEHLdr6">https://forms.gle/7WHLEmLCBhTEHLdr6</a></p> <p>Thanks,<br>Ben</p> <p>P.S. I want you to be happy working for me. You'll be evaluated on results, nothing else.</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/plugin-genie-generalist-ft-or-pt-ms-power-automate">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/plugin-genie-generalist-ft-or-pt-ms-power-automate</a></p> Wed, 29 Apr 2026 06:23:30 +0000 Fri, 29 May 2026 06:23:30 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/plugin-genie-generalist-ft-or-pt-ms-power-automate https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/plugin-genie-generalist-ft-or-pt-ms-power-automate trainwell: Insurance Sales Coach Anywhere in the World All Other Remote Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4992/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Tiffin, United States <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://trainwell.co">http://trainwell.co</a> </p> <p>Trainwell is the premier sales training and implementation company for insurance agencies. We work with top-producing agents — many ranked in the top 10 nationally — to scale their production, build accountability systems, and transform their teams into elite closers.<br><br>Our coaching is built on the 4 Pillars: needs-based sales process, accountability and management, marketing and lead ROI, and hiring and ramp. We don't do fluff. We don't recycle 2014-era training. We install systems that produce measurable results — and our clients pay a premium for it.<br>We're scaling fast, and we're hiring a Coach to work directly with our highest-tier clients.<br><br><strong>The Role</strong><br>As a Trainwell Coach, you'll work 1-on-1 and in group settings with insurance agents and their teams to drive production, install systems, and build winning sales cultures. This is not a babysitting role. You'll be expected to deliver outcomes — and you'll have the platform, IP, and team behind you to do it.</p> <p></p> <p><strong>What You'll Do</strong><br></p> <ul> <li>Coach insurance agents and team members through structured 3-month engagements</li> <li>Install needs-based sales processes built around the Golden Multiline Script</li> <li>Diagnose and fix breakdowns in sales process, accountability, hiring, and lead ROI</li> <li>Build and refine accountability systems for agency teams</li> <li>Lead live group calls, roleplay sessions, and 1-on-1 coaching</li> <li>Review recorded sales calls and deliver actionable feedback</li> <li>Help clients hire, ramp, and retain top-performing team members</li> <li>Identify upgrade opportunities and move clients into higher-tier programs</li> <li>Contribute to the evolution of Trainwell's IP, curriculum, and coaching methodology</li> </ul> <p><br><strong>What You Get</strong><br></p> <ul> <li>$180K-$220K+ earning potential (base + performance compensation)</li> <li>Fully remote — work from anywhere</li> <li>Direct access to Trainwell's IP, frameworks, and proprietary tools (including AI George)</li> <li>Growth inside a company scaling toward 8 figures</li> <li>Real ownership of client outcomes</li> <li>A seat at the table with the team redefining insurance sales training</li> </ul> <p><strong>Requirements</strong></p> <p><strong>What We're Looking For</strong><br><strong>Required:</strong><br></p> <ul> <li>Experience as a captive insurance agent, agency team lead, or top-producing team member</li> <li>Documented track record of elite production </li> <li>Deep understanding of multiline insurance sales — auto, home, life, financial services</li> <li>Ability to coach, teach, and develop people (not just close)</li> <li>Strong systems thinking — you build processes, not just hit numbers</li> </ul> <p><strong>Highly Preferred:</strong><br></p> <ul> <li>Experience hiring, ramping, and managing licensed team members</li> <li>Background in life and financial services production</li> <li>Prior coaching, training, or sales management experience</li> <li>Comfort with technology (GHL, AI tools)</li> <li>Fitness, military, or athletics background</li> </ul> <p><strong>You Are:</strong><br></p> <ul> <li>Hungry, humble, and coachable</li> <li>Obsessed with winning and incapable of accepting average</li> <li>Direct in your communication — you tell people the truth even when it's uncomfortable</li> <li>A lifelong learner who has invested s
